title: Off-by-one error when indexing individual pins of a bus

features.name: part_select_read_on_non_zero_based_bus
features.description: Code should include a part-select read from a wire or port with a non-zero lower bound in its range declaration

features.name: part_select_write_on_non_zero_based_bus
features.description: Code should include a part-select write to a wire or port with a non-zero lower bound in its range declaration
